title: Sweetgum · the watch
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: The watch, stood
entries.blurb: Three colors, one camp, one night that keeps not ending. You stood the watch anyway. That was the whole ask.

entries.title: NOT A STATION
entries.blurb: You tried to file the island light in the log. The log has a stamp for this: NOT A STATION. Somebody had the stamp made, which means you weren't the first.

entries.title: The round with no padlock
entries.blurb: You stood your check at the waterline while the light was on. No lock there. The water holds itself. Across it, the light did not move when you moved.
